constraints: Runner must treat all sub-projects as blackbox stages
Runner must not import or rely on internal code of any sub-project
Runner must invoke stages only via CLI using unified interface
Each stage must be executed using: node src/index.js --input_json=... --output_dir=...
Runner must only read stage outputs from stage_output.json
Runner must not infer or reconstruct artifacts
Runner must fail immediately if any stage returns status FAILED
Runner must not mutate stage artifacts
All execution must be deterministic (no timestamps, no randomness)
All paths must be explicit and reproducible
Stages must execute strictly in defined order
Each stage must have its own isolated output directory
Runner must persist input_json for each stage
Runner must persist stage_output.json for each stage
Runner must build a pipeline_report.json summarizing all stages
Runner must include stage execution status, artifacts, and timing in report
Runner must not auto-generate missing artifacts
If required artifact is missing, pipeline must fail
plan.goal: Build a deterministic orchestration runner that executes a fixed sequence of blackbox video processing stages using a unified stage interface and produces a final composed video with full execution trace.
plan.summary: Refactor pipeline-runner around a blackbox stage runtime: first implement deterministic stage invocation, isolated workspace layout, input_json persistence, and stage_output validation; then wire the five standardized stages through explicit artifact resolution and final output projection; finally harden the runner with end-to-end tests, report validation, and final artifact checks.

acceptance_criteria: Runner can invoke a blackbox stage only via CLI using input_json and output_dir
Each stage run persists its exact input_json and reads exactly one stage_output.json from the stage output directory
Runner validates stage_output.json structure and fails if status is FAILED or required fields are missing
Workspace layout is deterministic and stage-isolated under projects/pipeline-runner/runtime/stages/<stage_id>/
No runner code imports any source file from sub-project repositories
deliverables: tests covering invoke, fail-fast, and workspace layout
work_items.goal: Replace legacy runner assumptions with a deterministic blackbox stage runtime that only knows how to write input_json, invoke a stage CLI, and validate stage_output.json.
repair_notes: If coder needs to import sub-project code, the plan is wrong and implementation must fail
If tests require direct knowledge of sub-project internals, that indicates contract leakage and should be fixed in runner tests instead
If stage_output validation is too weak to catch missing artifacts or FAILED status, that is a planning issue because later works depend on strict contract enforcement
work_items.scope_summary: Implement the runner core that creates isolated stage directories, persists input_json, invokes stage CLIs deterministically, and validates stage_output.json without any knowledge of sub-project internals.
work_items.title: Implement blackbox stage runtime and deterministic workspace
verification_steps: Run the runner unit tests that simulate stage invocation and stage_output validation
Verify each stage runtime directory path is deterministic and isolated
Verify the runner fails immediately when stage_output.json is missing, malformed, or FAILED

acceptance_criteria: Runner executes ingest, transcript, subtitle, dub_audio, and final in strict order using only persisted input_json and stage_output.json
Inter-stage artifact routing uses logical artifact names from stage_output.json rather than hardcoded sub-project internals
Runner fails when any required upstream artifact logical name is absent or resolves to a missing file
pipeline_report.json is deterministic and includes per-stage status, artifacts, and final_video_path
deliverables: pipeline stage graph wiring for the fixed five-stage sequence
artifact resolver that maps logical names to concrete runtime paths
final output projection from stage artifacts to runtime root
tests covering artifact routing and fail-fast behavior
work_items.goal: Wire the runner to the five standardized blackbox stages using explicit artifact routing and deterministic pipeline reporting.
repair_notes: If coder needs to hardcode internal sub-project filenames beyond logical artifact names already exposed by stage_output.json, that indicates a planning violation
If pipeline_report.json includes timestamps or unstable runtime values, later determinism checks will fail and should be treated as implementation failure
If final output projection requires synthesizing or reconstructing a missing artifact, the work must fail because runner mutation is forbidden
work_items.scope_summary: Connect the blackbox runtime to the actual five-stage sequence, resolve logical artifacts between stages, project the final video artifact to runtime root, and write a deterministic pipeline report.
work_items.title: Wire fixed stage sequence and artifact resolution
verification_steps: Run integration tests that simulate each stage producing stage_output.json with logical artifacts
Verify final stage input_json is built only from upstream logical artifacts and project inputs
Verify missing required artifact logical names cause immediate pipeline failure
Verify runtime/final_video.mp4 and runtime/pipeline_report.json are produced on successful execution

acceptance_criteria: A full end-to-end runner execution succeeds against the standardized blackbox stages and produces runtime/final_video.mp4
pipeline_report.json includes all five stages with stage_id, status, and artifacts
Two identical successful runs produce identical pipeline_report.json content
Runner verifies final stage outputs and fails when final video artifact is missing or invalid
README and directly affected tests reflect the blackbox unified interface and final runner behavior
deliverables: updated runner documentation for blackbox stage execution
work_items.goal: Fully achieve the original project goal by validating the refactored runner end-to-end, verifying determinism, and documenting the final blackbox orchestration behavior.
repair_notes: If end-to-end validation requires modifying sub-projects, that indicates the runner plan or stage assumptions are wrong and should be treated as a planning issue
If report determinism fails because of runner-added timestamps or unstable fields, that is an implementation failure in this work
If documentation diverges from actual CLI or artifact behavior, later operator usage will break and the work must not be approved

end_to_end_project_inputs.video_path: absolute input video path for runner execution
end_to_end_project_inputs.target_language: target language string for runner execution

work_items.scope_summary: Validate the fully wired blackbox runner end-to-end, prove deterministic reporting and final output correctness, and update tests and docs so the project is execution-ready.
work_items.title: Validate end-to-end runner and finalize operator-facing behavior
verification_steps: Run the full pipeline-runner end-to-end against the standardized stage sequence
Run the same successful pipeline twice and compare pipeline_report.json for exact equality
Verify pipeline_report.json contains five stages with stage_id, status, and artifacts
Verify the runner fails when final_video_mp4 is missing from the final stage output
